fields.helpText: This field contains the number, between 1 and 27, of this major AMIS code. AMIS codes are used in the compilation of various workload reports,  including the AMIS Report. On certain reports that are sorted by procedure, the sort is actually done by the AMIS category of the procedure.

This field contains a brief description, 3-50 characters, of this AMIS code. AMIS codes are used in the compilation of various workload reports, including the AMIS Report.   Since the AMIS codes are assigned by the Radiology Central Office, they should not be changed without the approval of the Central Office.

This field contains the weighted work unit, a number between 1 and 80, associated with this AMIS code.  These weights are used in the compilation of various workload reports, including the AMIS Report.   Since these weights are assigned by the Radiology Central Office, they should not be changed without the approval of the Central Office.
